data.label: libarc
data.description: libarc 是一个轻量级的C语言解压缩库，专注于解压而非压缩。它支持 tar、tar.gz/tgz、zip、lzh 和 MIME multipart 等格式，适合在嵌入式或资源受限环境中使用。

data.label: libarc
data.description: libarc is a lightweight C decompression library focused on decompression rather than compression. It supports formats such as tar, tar.gz/tgz, zip, lzh, and MIME multipart, making it suitable for embedded or resource-constrained environments.
